name: Zura Bio Ltd
summary: PART I Overview We are a clinical-stage biotechnology company developing novel and differentiated medicines for patients with autoimmune and inflammatory diseases, including serious and debilitating conditions with significant unmet medical need. These diseases are often chronic, biologically complex and difficult to treat, and many patients do not achieve durable disease control with currently available therapies.
